items.titolo: Messi and Ronaldo Are Building Tech Portfolios. Mo Salah Is Playing a Different Game
items.descrizione: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo are betting on AI, health tech, and startups. Mohamed Salah is taking a more traditional route beyond football.
